topic: Improve spec-kit memory retrieval/search intelligence (6 open problems)

focus: Generic-query recall: why weak despite HyDE+multi-query ON
noveltyJustification: Root cause net-new: simple-tier route SKIPS channels + HyDE gated to deep/low-confidence, so generic short queries bypass the recall machinery they most need

ruledOut.reason: flags are ON (multiQueryEnabled:true live); problem is per-query routing

ruledOut.approach: embedding model too weak for short queries
ruledOut.reason: channel-reduction + no-expansion explains symptom without invoking model quality

noveltyJustification: Converts the AND-gate defect into a concrete margin-aware disjunction with exact thresholds and a K-cap that decouples recall from request-quality

ruledOut.approach: gate on topScore only, drop qualityRatio
ruledOut.reason: a fluke high-cosine hit on a vague query would falsely read good; keep margin-OR-ratio guard

noveltyJustification: Pinpointed exact greedy-accumulate-with-hard-break starve-the-tail bug at hybrid-search.ts:2768 and that truncation is unconditional at budget 4000

ruledOut.approach: dynamic token budget OFF means no truncation
stage4 per-tier state limits cause count:1

focus: Lightweight reranker value + FSRS cold-tier tuning
noveltyJustification: Net-new sequencing recommendation (free cosine reorder before any model reranker) and structural argument that cold-crowding is already suppressed

ruledOut.approach: re-add cross-encoder/local-GGUF reranker as first step
ruledOut.reason: was inert before removal, adds latency+dependency, no labeled-set lift evidence
cold crowding empirically near-inert (~2 rows) + double penalty via stability*centrality

noveltyJustification: Consolidation: net-new calibration non-monotonicity worked example (0.89 cosine -> 0.446 medium) and shared-root-cause synthesis, but mostly synthesizes prior iterations

ruledOut.reason: cap is harmless; fix is monotonicity + labeled calibration, not a bigger ceiling
